findings.title: Potential hardcoded API key in auth configuration
findings.description: A string matching an API key pattern was found in the authentication configuration file. This could expose the key if the repository is public.
findings.recommendation: Move the API key to an environment variable or a secrets manager (e.g., GitHub Secrets, HashiCorp Vault).

findings.title: Connection string with embedded credentials
findings.description: A database connection string containing username and password was found in a configuration file.
findings.recommendation: Extract credentials from the connection string and use environment variables.

findings.title: Vulnerable dependency: lodash@4.17.20
findings.description: lodash@4.17.20 has a known prototype pollution vulnerability (CVE-2021-23337).

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: The application does not set a Content-Security-Policy header, which helps prevent XSS attacks.
findings.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy header in the server configuration or via a middleware.
